scenarios.description: sourceRange returns UntrackedAttr when parent is null (parent == null branch)
sourceRange delegates to parent.sourceRange when parent is non-null (parent != null branch)
scenarios.precondition: Attribute constructed with fake Attributes parent stub that returns a known Range.AttributeRange for the key
scenarios.expectedResult: returned value is the stubbed Range.AttributeRange instance
pseudocode: // stub Attributes to return custom range
Attributes stubParent = new Attributes(){ @Override public Range.AttributeRange sourceRange(String k){ return new Range.AttributeRange(1,2,3,4);} };
Attribute attr = new Attribute("data-test", null, stubParent);
